text: The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Washington St, to the South by 6 Points Rd, to the East by Lee St, and to the West by I-55. The subject is located in a neighborhood on the westside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family detached ranch style house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment.
